title: News - Helen Maguire MP
headings: h2: Latest news from Epsom & Ewell
h2: Lib Dem MP for Epsom & Ewell says YouTube ads are “immune to accountability” and calls for “urgent” reform to advertising regulations.
h2: Helen Maguire MP calls for rail fare freeze with passengers travelling from Leatherhead to London Waterloo set to pay £189 more each year
h2: Government must “put social care front and centre of NHS 10 Year Plan” to end bed-blocking at Epsom Hospital, claims local Lib Dem MP
h2: Lib Dem MP for Epsom & Ewell says mortgage lenders are treating families as “cash cows” and says Chancellor needs to “stand up for struggling mortgage holders”
h2: Almost half of Brits wouldn’t swim in sea as MP for Epsom & Ewell slams “damning indictment” of the state of our waterways
h2: Surrey’s six Liberal Democrat MPs demand profit cap on “profiteering” private SEND providers

news_items.title: Stop The Delays To Epsom & St Helier
Lib Dem MP for Epsom & Ewell says YouTube ads are “immune to accountability” and calls for “urgent” reform to advertising regulations.
Helen Maguire MP calls for rail fare freeze with passengers travelling from Leatherhead to London Waterloo set to pay £189 more each year
